intent.raw: $invoke the design and show it to me with short phrases, use story telling for me as a user that will participate in this and doesnt know nothing from it
intent.objective: Produce a governed story-first participant design and isolated browser prototype that explains the Resonant Time Capsule to a newcomer.
intent.target_artifact: Story-first Time Capsule UX design and review prototype
intent.operator_sentence: Let me live the story before I have to understand the mechanism.

subagent_strategy.explanation: The task is one bounded authoring route and no delegation was requested or required.

steps.name: Build bounded participant-story context
stop_conditions: A participant promise, ritual claim, or capability boundary lacks evidence or an explicit candidate label.

steps.name: Select design and composition transports
stop_conditions: The transport cannot express six architecture views, the full journey, and the rehearsal boundary.

steps.name: Design the story-first participant architecture
stop_conditions: The design implies a personal message score, Bitcoin message storage, working saved-message custody, or a new number at each opening.

steps.name: Reduce and prove the participant unit
stop_conditions: The selected unit loses the future return, number path, or voluntary participation boundary.

steps.name: Compose and audition the participant story
stop_conditions: Copy becomes rule-first, coercive, grandiose, technically false, or incomplete across the journey.

steps.name: Project the candidate into an isolated review prototype
stop_conditions: The prototype collects, persists, transmits, or claims to implement saved-message protection.

gates.condition: The visitor encounters invitation, future openings, message action, shared-number path, and honest receipt in that order.
The copy does not imply personal numeric weight, Bitcoin message storage, live saved-message safety, reward, or compulsory participation.
The HTML is browser-only, volatile, and isolated from the hosted site.
The acceptance signals in UX-PLAN.md pass with first-time participants.
Hosted-site mutation, live intake, and ceremony implementation require separate authorization.

state_namespaces.owner: future Task Session and production owners
state_namespaces.write_policy: Read-only; no publication, deployment, collection, persistence, or ceremony mutation.

promotion_splits.rule: Operator review and first-time participant comprehension evidence are required before promotion.

promotion_guardrails: Do not claim the story has solved comprehension before participant evidence exists.
Do not reuse the prototype as live intake or a privacy implementation.
Do not treat candidate Bitcoin or range rules as approved ceremony rules.
